name: Codenames
description: Codenames is Vlaada Chvátil's Spiel-des-Jahres-2016-winning word association party game — two team spymasters give one-word clues that connect multiple of their team's code-named cards on a shared 5x5 grid, while avoiding the opposing team's cards, the bystanders, and the dreaded assassin. The clue is one word; the connections are everything. Now a small empire of variants and translations.
